title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Imperial Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Imperial Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
